title: Implement Zephyr prefix DAO parity
description: Add bounded canonical prefix keys, owner paths, grouped DAO processing, longest-prefix lookup, lifecycle, capacity, and authorization to Zephyr C with native tests and shared vectors.
acceptance_criteria: Zephyr C passes canonical prefix routing vectors with bounded memory and atomic rejection.
notes:
THE RIGHT THING:
1. Read spec/05-routing.md section on prefix DAO
2. Reference impl: rust/lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs (already passes vectors)
3. Python impl: python/src/lichen/rpl/routing.py
4. Zephyr target: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/
5. Key: bounded prefix keys (no malloc), longest-prefix lookup, lifecycle
6. Build: west build -b native_sim lichen/apps/puck -- -DCONFIG_LICHEN_RPL_TEST=y
